popularStory.headline: Marguerite de Bourgogne (1393-1441)
popularStory.description:
Marguerite de Bourgogne (8 décembre 1393—2 février 1441), fille de Jean sans Peur, duc de Bourgogne et de Marguerite de Bavière. Elle épouse :

en premières noces, au berceau, le premier dauphin Charl …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Marie de Bourgogne Herzogin von Kleve於1393年出生在法國布格o-達迪喬時，她的父親Jean de Bourgogne I "sans peur", Duc de Bourgogne22歲，母親Margarete von Bayern Duchesse consort de Bourgogne30歲。她於1409年7月22日與Adolf I von Kleve Herzog von Kleve.在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇可列維斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1463年10月30日在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可列福阿爾特卡爾卡爾蒙萊波格享年70歲，埋葬在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可列福可列福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marie de Bourgogne Herzogin von Kleve于1393年出生在法国布格o-達迪喬时，她的父亲Jean de Bourgogne I "sans peur", Duc de Bourgogne22岁，母亲Margarete von Bayern Duchesse consort de Bourgogne30岁。她于1409年7月22日与Adolf I von Kleve Herzog von Kleve.在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇可列維斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1463年10月30日在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可列福阿爾特卡爾卡爾蒙萊波格享年70岁，埋葬在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可列福可列福。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bourgogne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bourgoin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphee, Alyre, Andre, Armand, Aurore, Celina, Emile, Gilberte, Jacques, Laurent, Lucienne, Olivier.

variant of Bourgouin (and, in North America, an altered form of this), a habitational name for someone from Burgundy (Old French Bourgogne), a region of eastern France having Dijon as its center. The area was invaded by the Burgundii, an ancient Germanic tribe from whom it takes its name, in about AD 480. The duchy of Burgundy, created in 877 by Charles II, King of the Western Franks, was extremely powerful in the later Middle Ages, especially under Philip the Bold (1342–1404; duke from 1363). Compare Bourgoyne and Bourguignon .

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

en.lifeSummary: When Marie de Bourgogne Herzogin von Kleve was born in 1393, in Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Burgundy, France, her father, Jean de Bourgogne I "sans peur", Duc de Bourgogne, was 22 and her mother, Margarete von Bayern Duchesse consort de Bourgogne, was 30. She married Adolf I von Kleve Herzog von Kleve. on 22 July 1409, in Cleves, Holy Roman Empire. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 30 October 1463, in Monreberg, Altkalkar, Kleve, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, at the age of 70, and was buried in Cleves, Kleve, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marie de Bourgogne Herzogin von Kleve est née en 1393, à Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, France, son père, Jean de Bourgogne I "sans peur", Duc de Bourgogne, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Margarete von Bayern Duchesse consort de Bourgogne, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Adolf I von Kleve Herzog von Kleve. le 22 juillet 1409, à Cleves, Saint-Empire romain. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 30 octobre 1463, à Monreberg, Altkalkar, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Kleve, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marie de Bourgogne Herzogin von Kleve 1393 in Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Burgund, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jean de Bourgogne I "sans peur", Duc de Bourgogne 22 und ihre Mutter Margarete von Bayern Duchesse consort de Bourgogne 30. Sie hat am 22. Juli 1409 in Cleves, Heiliges Römisches Reich Adolf I von Kleve Herzog von Kleve. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 30. Oktober 1463 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Monreberg, Altkalkar, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland und wurde in Kleve, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marie de Bourgogne Herzogin von Kleve è nata il nel 1393 nel Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, sua padre, Jean de Bourgogne I "sans peur", Duc de Bourgogne, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Margarete von Bayern Duchesse consort de Bourgogne, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Adolf I von Kleve Herzog von Kleve. il 22 luglio 1409, nel Cleves, Heiliges Römisches Reich. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 30 ottobre 1463, nel Monreberg, Altkalkar, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a Kleve, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Marie de Bourgogne Herzogin von Kleveが1393年にフランスボウルゴグンクoテ-ド'オルディジョンで生まれた時，父Jean de Bourgogne I "sans peur", Duc de Bourgogneは22歳，母Margarete von Bayern Duchesse consort de Bourgogneは30歳であった。1409年7月22日にヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチクレベスでAdolf I von Kleve Herzog von Kleve.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1463年10月30日にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレブアルトカルカルモンレバーグで70歳で死去し，ドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレブクレブにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marie de Bourgogne Herzogin von Kleve(이)가 1393년 프랑스 부르고그니 co테-드'어 디조에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jean de Bourgogne I "sans peur", Duc de Bourgogne(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margarete von Bayern Duchesse consort de Bourgogne(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1409년 7월 22일 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 클레브스에서 Adolf I von Kleve Herzog von Kleve.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1463년 10월 30일 독일 노르드하이-베스트파렌 클브 알트캘카르 몬레버그에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 노르드하이-베스트파렌 클브 클브에 묻혔다.

pt.Ravenstein, North Brabant, Netherlands: Ravenstein, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marie de Bourgogne Herzogin von Kleve nasceu em 1393, em Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, França, seu pai, Jean de Bourgogne I "sans peur", Duc de Bourgogne, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Margarete von Bayern Duchesse consort de Bourgogne, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Adolf I von Kleve Herzog von Kleve. em 22 de julho de 1409, em Cleves, Heiliges Römisches Reich. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 30 de outubro de 1463, em Monreberg, Altkalkar, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em Kleve, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marie de Bourgogne Herzogin von Kleve родилась в 1393 г. в местности диджон, кoте-д'ор, бургогн, Франция, её отцу по имени Jean de Bourgogne I "sans peur", Duc de Bourgogne было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Margarete von Bayern Duchesse consort de Bourgogne, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Adolf I von Kleve Herzog von Kleve. 22 июля 1409 г. в местности кливесь, хилигесь рoмищесь раич. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 30 октября 1463 г. в местности монребирг, алткалкар, клив, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности клив, клив, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия.

es.Ravenstein, North Brabant, Netherlands: Ravenstein, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marie de Bourgogne Herzogin von Kleve nació en 1393, en Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, su papá, Jean de Bourgogne I "sans peur", Duc de Bourgogne, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Margarete von Bayern Duchesse consort de Bourgogne, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Adolf I von Kleve Herzog von Kleve. el 22 de julio de 1409, en Cleves, Heiliges Römisches Reich. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 30 de octubre de 1463, en Monreberg, Altkalkar, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultada en Kleve, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania.
